comment_create.description: User creates a new comment on an object. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

comment_edit.description: User edits their own comment. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

comment_delete.trigger: DELETE /api/community/comments/[id], DELETE /api/community/comments/batch, GraphQL commentDelete/commentsDelete, MCP community_comment_delete, or registered GraphQL operations
comment_delete.description: User deletes their own comment. Transport-originated writes include safe metadata.source where available.

comment_react.trigger: POST /api/community/comments/[id]/reactions, DELETE /api/community/comments/[id]/reactions, MCP community_comment_reaction_add, or MCP community_comment_reaction_remove
comment_react.description: User adds or removes a reaction on an active visible comment. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

description_edit.description: User updates an object description (content changed). The description row, edit history, and audit row are committed together.

upload_delete.trigger: DELETE /api/workspace/uploads/[id], GraphQL uploadDelete, MCP workspace_upload_delete, or the registered GraphQL operation
upload_delete.description: User deletes an upload they own. Transport-originated writes include metadata.source where available. After storage deletion succeeds, metadata deletion and the audit row are committed together.

section_retire.description: The importer marks one missing in-scope Section retired without deleting the row or children. The same transaction records the Section target, source snapshot SHA-256, observation time, jwId, and previous sourceLastSeenAt.

section_reactivate.description: The importer clears retiredAt and refreshes sourceLastSeenAt. The same transaction records the Section target, source snapshot SHA-256, observation time, jwId, and previous retiredAt.

admin_user_suspend.description: Admin suspends a user account. The suspension change and audit row are committed together.

admin_user_unsuspend.description: Admin lifts a user suspension. The suspension change and audit row are committed together.

admin_comment_moderate.description: Admin hides or moderates a comment. The moderation change and audit row are committed together.

admin_description_moderate.description: Admin updates description content from the moderation workflow. The description row, edit history, and audit row are committed together.

writer: writeAuditLog records app audit rows and Cloudflare Analytics Engine datapoints. The Node-only static loader writes Section lifecycle rows directly with its import transaction. Required trails are awaited in the same transaction where practical; fireAuditLog remains non-critical telemetry.
